meaning: vt.过分夸赞,奉承,阿谀,使高兴,使满意,(画,肖像上的形象)胜过(真人或实物)
examples: Are you trying to flatter me?
That colour doesn't flatter many people.
Clever tailoring can flatter your figure.
Out of utter frustration, I designed a line of jeans that would flatter my figure.
But there's some reason to suspect these numbers may, if anything, flatter real estate performance.
